Defendant Yelp Inc. Notice Of Petition And Petition To Compel Arbitration And For A Stay Of Civil Proceedings (Part 2 Of 2 For Tentative Ruling)
Off Calendar May-01-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Petition And Petition To Compel Arbitration And For A Stay Of Civil Proceedings
Off Calendar May-01-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT YELP INC.'s Petition To Compel Arbitration And For A Stay Of Civil Proceedings.

Defendant Yelp Inc.'s petition to compel arbitration is granted and the action is stayed pending the arbitration of plaintiff Mark Weathers' claims. (see word minutes for complete details)

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/EPS)
